vocab.meaning: có lợi cho, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho
vocab.example: A quiet room with plenty of natural light is highly conducive to effective learning.

vocab.meaning: áp lực nhận thức (lượng thông tin mà trí não phải xử lý)
vocab.example: A chaotic environment increases your cognitive load, leaving less mental energy for actual studying.

vocab.meaning: cách bố trí (bàn ghế) đúng tiêu chuẩn bảo vệ sức khỏe
vocab.example: Investing in an ergonomic setup helps prevent physical discomfort during long revision sessions.
A well-organized workspace can significantly foster productivity and help students meet tight deadlines.

vocab.meaning: một góc biệt lập, yên tĩnh
vocab.example: I prefer to find a secluded spot in the library where I won't be interrupted by passersby.

vocab.meaning: mất tập trung, lơ đãng (thường do môi trường không tốt)
vocab.example: If there are too many distractions, I tend to zone out and find myself staring at the wall instead of my books.
Every student has different optimal conditions; some need total silence while others prefer white noise.
It is vital to minimize distractions by turning off phone notifications before starting a study session.

vocab.meaning: sự minh mẫn về tâm trí
vocab.example: A minimalist study area promotes mental clarity, allowing for better synthesis of complex information.
A vibrant yet orderly environment can stimulate the mind and make the learning process more enjoyable.
